name: Thai Shrimp Salad
intro: Here’s a deliciously different salad that combines grilled shrimp (a lean protein source) with low-calorie cucumbers and onions. It is made with a refreshing Thai blend of sesame seeds, coriander, lime and mint.

ingredients.item: A dash of crushed red pepper flakes
Peeled and deveined uncooked large shrimp

method: In a large bowl, combine the lime juice, sesame oil, soy sauce, sesame seeds, mint, cilantro, and red pepper flakes.
Sprinkle shrimp with salt and pepper. Thread the shrimps onto 2 metal or soaked wooden skewers.
Place skewers on an oiled grill. Cover and cook over medium heat for 2 to 4 minutes.
Add shrimp, onion, and cucumber into the sauce (Step 1) and stir well.
Divide lettuce leaf between 2 salad plates and top each one of them with shrimp mixture (Step 4). Serve immediately.
